session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. Focus on whether ruff lint passes now.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results, focusing on whether ruff lint passes.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check ruff lint and other quick checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1672 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
... [108 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command completed with an exit code of 2 (failure). Here's the detailed report:
## Summary
**RUFF LINT: PASSED** ✓
The ruff lint check passed with "All checks passed!" as reported.
## Full Results
**Failures:** - **Prettier formatting check FAILED**: 2 files need formatting - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passes:** - **Ruff Lint**: All checks passed ✓ - **Ruff Format**: 1672 files already formatted ✓ - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md**: PASSED ✓ - **Type checking (ty)**: All checks passed ✓ - **Exec Reference Check**: OK ✓ - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5939 passed ✓ - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed ✓ - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed ✓ - **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)**: 24 passed ✓
## Conclusion
**Ruff lint passes successfully.** The only failure is in the Prettier markdown formatting check for two documentation files. The underlying code quality (ruff lint, type checking, and all tests) is solid.
